name: Baked Potato Soup II
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Bake the potatoes until fork tender.
3. Melt butter in a medium saucepan.
4. Slowly blend in flour with a wire whisk until thoroughly blended.
5. Gradually add milk to the butter-flour mixture, whisking constantly.
6. Whisk in salt and pepper and simmer over low heat, stirring constantly.
7. Cut potatoes in half, scoop out the insides, and set aside.
8. Chop half of the potato peels and discard the remainder.
9. When the milk mixture is very hot, whisk in the scooped-out potato pieces.
10. Add green onions and chopped potato peels.
11. Whisk well, then add sour cream and crumbled bacon.
12. Heat thoroughly until all ingredients are melted together.
13. Gradually add grated cheddar cheese, stirring constantly until fully melted.
